MINI MINUTES: Comissioner Everett Hewlett Jr.; Clerk: NBautista ; Not Reported. (D218)
Appearances:
Plaintiff Remberto Sainez, is present.
Attorney, Brenda Keith Cruz appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant, Ryan Loiselle, is present.
Attorney, Brett Silton, representing the defendant through limited scope.
The Judge Pro Tem Kristin Rosi, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 304B, for settlement discussions.
The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed.
This case settled, the trial date of NOV-15-2010 is vacated.
